chunks.title: Hoi An food tour
chunks.text: Try cao lau noodles and banh mi in the Hoi An old town. Best in the morning markets.

chunks.title: An Bang beach guide
chunks.text: An Bang beach is 4km from Hoi An. Calm water, sun loungers, seafood shacks.

chunks.title: My Son sanctuary ruins
chunks.text: UNESCO My Son ruins are Cham temples in a jungle valley. Go early to beat the heat.

chunks.title: Tra Que herb village cycle tour
chunks.text: Cycle to Tra Que organic herb village, ride a basket boat, learn to cook local dishes.

chunks.title: Dong ecovillage homestay
chunks.text: Community-based homestay at Dong ecovillage near Hoi An. Cycling, cooking, no single-use plastic.
